title: Mongolia 100
text:
Daily Mongolia Fact Game
      Mongolia 100
      
        Work through 100 Mongolia facts, keep your streak alive, and clear the full trail
        without seeing the same question twice in one cycle.

        Streak saved locally

        Use the archive if you want to study before or after a streak run.

      Loading question...
      
        Pick the best answer. Correct answers grow your streak. Wrong answers reset the streak,
        but the card still retires so you will not see it again in the same run.
      
      
      
        
        
        Next fact
      
      
        Restart cycle
      
    

    
      How it works
      
        Each cycle uses all 100 fact cards once.
        Cards never repeat inside a cycle, even after a wrong answer.
        Your streak counts only consecutive correct answers.
        Finishing the deck makes you the winner and unlocks a restart prompt.
        A fresh reshuffle starts the next time you restart a completed run.
      
      
        Current run
        Preparing the question trail...
      
    
  

  
    Source Notes
    
      Fact prompts were compiled from general reference material on Mongolia, including
      Britannica, UNESCO listings, the CIA World Factbook, and Mongolia-focused culture and
      travel references. The game presents them as short quiz cards rather than quoted source text.
    
  



  
    Trail Complete
    You cleared all 100 Mongolia facts.
    
      Your current cycle is complete. Restart to reshuffle the deck and play again.
